main.description: A player's durable story state for one world — the per-player source of truth, written to the PLAYER'S OWN repo (user-owned, $0 to us). The engine's MemoryStore is the in-process projection: on load we restore() this save; at checkpoints (long-rest / session end / every N actions) we putRecord the snapshot. NOT written per micro-action — localStorage buffers the hot path; ATProto is the batched durable target (the 'never a record per footstep' rule). rkey = the world key (ship seed). The state is a serialized snapshot string so the save can evolve without re-versioning this lexicon; an event-sourced variant (append-only) is the scale path, with this aggregate as its periodic fold.

world.description: World key (ship seed) this save belongs to.

stateJson.description: Serialized MemoryStore.snapshot(): facts, placements, inventory, equipment, npc standing, xp/tier. A projection of play, durable here.
